Package de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Class IdentitySequentPrintFilter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.SequentPrintFilter
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.IdentitySequentPrintFilter
public class IdentitySequentPrintFilter extends SequentPrintFilter
Identity Filter not doing anything
